name: Uncle Dan's Pawn - Lake June
description_short: Uncle Dan's Pawn Lake June is a Dallas-area pawn shop offering collateral loans up to $10K, jewelry services, and authenticated designer goods resale in Pleasant Grove.
description_long:
Uncle Dan's Pawn has operated in the Dallas area for over 35 years, establishing itself as a multi-location pawn operation with a presence across Dallas suburbs. The Lake June location, situated on Lake June Road near S. Buckner in Pleasant Grove, represents their expansion of community-focused pawn services. The shop positions itself as a reliable alternative financial provider serving the local area with personalized service and fair dealing practices.

The Lake June location offers a comprehensive suite of pawn and retail services. Core offerings include collateral-based loans up to $10,000, gold and jewelry buying/selling, FFL dealer services, and mobile app access for loan payments and extensions. The shop maintains an in-house jewelry lab for testing and repair, CAD jewelry design capabilities, and luxury watch inventory. Notably, they operate as an authenticated reseller of designer handbags and sneakers using Entrupy authentication services, and they stock both new and pre-owned fine jewelry retail merchandise. Additional services include electronics, tools, general merchandise, extended warranty programs, interest-free layaway, and Buy Now Pay Later financing options.

The Lake June location differentiates itself through specialized jewelry services and designer goods authentication that extend beyond typical pawn shop operations. The integration of a SMART Jewelry Warranty/Trade-up Program, CAD design services, and Entrupy designer authentication positions this location as serving both traditional pawn customers and upscale retail shoppers. The mobile app for loan management and the VIP Rewards Program suggest operational sophistication. Management is established with Noe Sorto as store manager and Michael Franco as general manager, with dedicated email contacts for customer service.

Honest assessment: This is a legitimate pawn shop with extended service capabilities, suitable for those needing quick collateral-based loans or wanting to buy/sell jewelry and authenticated designer goods. However, customers should understand that pawn loans involve interest charges and collateral forfeiture risk—this is not a credit-building tool. The $10K loan cap addresses emergency cash needs but may not suit larger financial goals. The VIP Rewards Program benefits repeat customers but offers only in-store redemption, limiting flexibility.
pros: Collateral loans up to $10,000 with mobile app for payments and loan extensions
In-house jewelry testing, repair, and CAD design services—specialized expertise uncommon in standard pawn shops
Entrupy-authenticated designer handbag and sneaker resale, serving upscale merchandise buyers
Multiple financing options including interest-free layaway and Buy Now Pay Later
FFL dealer status and gold dealer license demonstrate regulatory compliance and broader merchandise authority
Over 35 years of Dallas-area operating history with established management structure
Extended hours (open until 7 PM weekdays, 6 PM Saturdays, 5 PM Sundays) for working customers
cons: Pawn loans involve interest charges and risk of losing collateral—not a credit-building or wealth-preservation strategy
$10,000 loan cap may be insufficient for customers with larger emergency financial needs
VIP Rewards benefits can only be redeemed in-store, not online, limiting customer flexibility
No credit reporting or credit-building features—transactions do not improve credit scores
Limited transparency on interest rates and loan terms in published materials
best_for: Dallas-area residents needing quick short-term cash against collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools) when traditional credit is unavailable
Jewelry buyers and sellers seeking authenticated, quality pre-owned fine jewelry and luxury watches
Collectors and shoppers for authenticated designer handbags and sneakers at resale prices
Repeat customers who benefit from VIP Rewards program early access to merchandise and sales
diagnosis: Best for Dallas-area residents who own valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools) and need fast cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. Primary caveat: pawn loans charge interest and require collateral surrender—they solve immediate cash flow crises but are not credit-building tools or long-term financial solutions. Suitable for emergency use, not ongoing debt management.
services: New and pre-owned fine jewelry retail
Electronics, tools, and general merchandise sales
Buy Now Pay Later financing options
Mobile app for loan payments and extensions
SMART Jewelry Warranty and Trade-up Program
